gaps.evidence_in_top_quartile: Top-quartile SaaS peers (Retool, Linear) have dedicated MLOps roles and automated model deployment pipelines.
gaps.evidence_at_prospect: BrightPath AI has no public MLOps or model deployment roles — data work is handled by a single Data Analyst.
gaps.gap_insight: Leading SaaS competitors have invested in MLOps infrastructure while BrightPath AI is still at the analytics stage — a 12-18 month capability gap.
